title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 701.305 - Educational information to be provided on department website
text:
701.305.  Educational information to be provided on department website. — The department of health and senior services shall provide on its internet website educational information that explains the rights and responsibilities of the property owner and tenants of a dwelling and the lead inspectors, risk assessors, and the lead abatement contractors.
(L. 2005 S.B. 95)
